name: Versamet Royalties Corp.
description: Versamet Royalties Corporation is a mid-tier precious metals royalty and streaming company focused on the acquisition and management of high-quality royalties, streams, and similar interests within the global mining sector. Formerly known as Sandbox Royalties Corp., the company maintains a diverse portfolio of assets across various development stages and jurisdictions, including Canada, Namibia, and Burkina Faso. By leveraging its robust cash flow generation and strategic asset management, Versamet Royalties aims to provide investors with unique exposure to the precious metals market while supporting the development of mining projects worldwide.
